Clinical_Variable: Notes: Continuous variables presented as mean °¿ standard deviation. Categorical variables presented as n (%). P-values from Kruskal-Wallis test for continuous variables and Chi-square test for categorical variables (Fisher's exact test for small cell counts). Post-hoc comparisons with Dunn's test (continuous) or Chi-square with Bonferroni correction (categorical). PFS: progression-free survival. HR: hazard ratio with 95% confidence interval.
